objective: Return 1 if n is even, 0 otherwise.
solution:
(module IsEven
  (defun is_even (n)
    (if (= (math_mod n 2) 0) 1 0))
  (test zero (eq? (is_even 0) 1))
  (test one (eq? (is_even 1) 0))
  (test two (eq? (is_even 2) 1))
  (test seven (eq? (is_even 7) 0))
  (test ten (eq? (is_even 10) 1)))

objective: Return the absolute value of n without using math_abs.
solution:
(module AbsValue
  (defun my_abs (n)
    (if (< n 0) (return (- 0 n)))
    n)
  (test pos (eq? (my_abs 5) 5))
  (test neg (eq? (my_abs -7) 7))
  (test zero (eq? (my_abs 0) 0))
  (test big_neg (eq? (my_abs -1000) 1000)))

objective: Clamp x into [lo, hi].
solution:
(module Clamp
  (defun clamp (x lo hi)
    (if (< x lo) (return lo))
    (if (> x hi) (return hi))
    x)
  (test in_range (eq? (clamp 5 0 10) 5))
  (test below (eq? (clamp -3 0 10) 0))
  (test above (eq? (clamp 99 0 10) 10))
  (test on_lo (eq? (clamp 0 0 10) 0))
  (test on_hi (eq? (clamp 10 0 10) 10)))

objective: Return the maximum of three numbers.
solution:
(module MaxOfThree
  (defun max3 (a b c)
    (def m a)
    (if (> b m) (set m b))
    (if (> c m) (set m c))
    m)
  (test asc (eq? (max3 1 2 3) 3))
  (test desc (eq? (max3 3 2 1) 3))
  (test mid (eq? (max3 2 5 3) 5))
  (test all_equal (eq? (max3 4 4 4) 4))
  (test negs (eq? (max3 -1 -5 -3) -1)))

objective: Compute factorial of n iteratively.
solution:
(module Factorial
  (defun fact (n)
    (def acc 1)
    (def i 2)
    (while (<= i n)
      (set acc (* acc i))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    acc)
  (test zero (eq? (fact 0) 1))
  (test one (eq? (fact 1) 1))
  (test five (eq? (fact 5) 120))
  (test seven (eq? (fact 7) 5040)))

objective: Compute base^exp for non-negative integer exp.
solution:
(module PowerInt
  (defun pow_int (base exp)
    (def acc 1)
    (def i 0)
    (while (< i exp)
      (set acc (* acc base))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    acc)
  (test zero_exp (eq? (pow_int 5 0) 1))
  (test one_exp (eq? (pow_int 5 1) 5))
  (test square (eq? (pow_int 3 2) 9))
  (test cube (eq? (pow_int 2 3) 8))
  (test ten (eq? (pow_int 10 4) 10000)))

objective: Reverse the digits of a non-negative integer.
solution:
(module ReverseDigits
  (defun reverse_digits (n)
    (def out 0)
    (def cur n)
    (while (> cur 0)
      (set out (+ (* out 10) (math_mod cur 10)))
      (set cur (math_floor (/ cur 10))))
    out)
  (test single (eq? (reverse_digits 5) 5))
  (test small (eq? (reverse_digits 12) 21))
  (test mid (eq? (reverse_digits 12345) 54321))
  (test trailing_zero (eq? (reverse_digits 100) 1)))

objective: Count occurrences of a substring (single char) in a string.
solution:
(module CountSubstring
  (defun count_char (s c)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def total 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) c) (set total (+ total 1)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    total)
  (test empty (eq? (count_char "" "a") 0))
  (test none (eq? (count_char "hello" "z") 0))
  (test one (eq? (count_char "hello" "h") 1))
  (test many (eq? (count_char "banana" "a") 3)))

objective: Return 1 if string is a palindrome, 0 otherwise.
solution:
(module IsPalindrome
  (defun is_palindrome (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def j (- n 1))
    (while (< i j)
      (if (= (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) (str_substring s j 1)) false)
        (return 0))
      (set i (+ i 1))
      (set j (- j 1)))
    1)
  (test empty (eq? (is_palindrome "") 1))
  (test single (eq? (is_palindrome "a") 1))
  (test yes (eq? (is_palindrome "racecar") 1))
  (test no (eq? (is_palindrome "hello") 0)))

objective: Sum the decimal digits of n.
solution:
(module SumDigits
  (defun sum_digits (n)
    (def s 0)
    (def cur n)
    (while (> cur 0)
      (set s (+ s (math_mod cur 10)))
      (set cur (math_floor (/ cur 10))))
    s)
  (test zero (eq? (sum_digits 0) 0))
  (test single (eq? (sum_digits 7) 7))
  (test multi (eq? (sum_digits 1234) 10))
  (test big (eq? (sum_digits 99999) 45)))

objective: Read env var KEY, return fallback if empty.
solution:
(module EnvOr
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun get_or (k fallback)
    (def v (env_read k))
    (if (str_eq v "") (return fallback))
    v)
  (test missing (mocks (env.get "X" "")) (eq? (get_or "X" "none") "none"))
  (test present (mocks (env.get "X" "hi")) (eq? (get_or "X" "none") "hi")))

objective: Read env var as int, fall back to default if empty.
solution:
(module EnvIntDefault
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun port_or (k default)
    (def v (env_read k))
    (if (str_eq v "") (return default))

  (test missing (mocks (env.get "PORT" "")) (eq? (port_or "PORT" 8080) 8080))
  (test set (mocks (env.get "PORT" "3000")) (eq? (port_or "PORT" 8080) 3000))
  (test zero (mocks (env.get "PORT" "0")) (eq? (port_or "PORT" 8080) 0)))

objective: Read env var and return uppercased value.
solution:
(module EnvUpper
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun upper_env (k)

  (test simple (mocks (env.get "NAME" "alice")) (eq? (upper_env "NAME") "ALICE"))
  (test mixed (mocks (env.get "NAME" "Foo Bar")) (eq? (upper_env "NAME") "FOO BAR"))

objective: Read HOST and PORT env, return HOST:PORT, or 'localhost:80' if either missing.
solution:
(module HostPort
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun host_port ()
    (def h (env_read "HOST"))
    (def p (env_read "PORT"))
    (if (str_eq h "") (return "localhost:80"))
    (if (str_eq p "") (return "localhost:80"))
    (str_concat h (str_concat ":" p)))
  (test both
    (mocks (env.get "HOST" "api.example.com") (env.get "PORT" "8443"))
    (eq? (host_port) "api.example.com:8443"))
  (test missing_host
    (mocks (env.get "HOST" "") (env.get "PORT" "80"))
    (eq? (host_port) "localhost:80"))
  (test missing_port
    (mocks (env.get "HOST" "x.com") (env.get "PORT" ""))
    (eq? (host_port) "localhost:80")))

objective: Read a file and return its first character (or empty string).
solution:
(module FileFirstChar
  (extern defun file_read (path) @capability "file.read")
  (defun first_char (path)
    (def c (file_read path))
    (if (str_eq c "") (return ""))
    (str_substring c 0 1))
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/a" "")) (eq? (first_char "/a") ""))
  (test single (mocks (file.read "/a" "x")) (eq? (first_char "/a") "x"))
  (test long (mocks (file.read "/a" "hello")) (eq? (first_char "/a") "h")))

objective: Count newline-separated lines in a file.
solution:
(module FileCountLines
  (extern defun file_read (path) @capability "file.read")
  (defun line_count (path)
    (def s (file_read path))
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def c 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) "\n") (set c (+ c 1)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    c)
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/f" "")) (eq? (line_count "/f") 0))
  (test one (mocks (file.read "/f" "a\n")) (eq? (line_count "/f") 1))
  (test two (mocks (file.read "/f" "a\nb\n")) (eq? (line_count "/f") 2))
  (test trailing (mocks (file.read "/f" "hi")) (eq? (line_count "/f") 0)))

objective: Return the byte length of a file's content.
solution:
(module FileSize
  (extern defun file_read (path) @capability "file.read")

  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/f" "")) (eq? (byte_size "/f") 0))
  (test small (mocks (file.read "/f" "hello")) (eq? (byte_size "/f") 5))
  (test newline (mocks (file.read "/f" "a\nb")) (eq? (byte_size "/f") 3)))

objective: Fetch URL and return body length.
solution:
(module HttpLen
  (extern defun http_get (url) @capability "http.fetch")
  (defun body_len (url)

  (test empty (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "")) (eq? (body_len "http://x") 0))

  (test big (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "hello world")) (eq? (body_len "http://x") 11)))

objective: Check whether a file exists by attempting to read it; non-empty content means present.
solution:
(module FileExists
  (extern defun file_read (p) @capability "file.read")
  (defun has_content (p)
    (def s (file_read p))
    (if (str_eq s "") (return 0))
    1)
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/a" "")) (eq? (has_content "/a") 0))
  (test present (mocks (file.read "/a" "data")) (eq? (has_content "/a") 1)))

objective: Apply tax pct to base, round to cents.
solution:
(module PriceTax
  (defun apply_tax (base pct)
    (* base (+ 1 (/ pct 100))))
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun final_price (base pct)
    (round2 (apply_tax base pct)))
  (test no_tax (near? (final_price 100 0) 100.0 0.01))
  (test ten_pct (near? (final_price 50 10) 55.0 0.01))
  (test fraction (near? (final_price 9.99 8) 10.79 0.01)))

objective: Apply percent discount, then tax, round to cents.
solution:
(module DiscountTax
  (defun discount (amount pct)
    (- amount (/ (* amount pct) 100)))
  (defun add_tax (amount pct)
    (* amount (+ 1 (/ pct 100))))
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun final (amount disc_pct tax_pct)
    (round2 (add_tax (discount amount disc_pct) tax_pct)))
  (test plain (near? (final 100 0 0) 100.0 0.01))
  (test only_discount (near? (final 100 10 0) 90.0 0.01))
  (test only_tax (near? (final 100 0 10) 110.0 0.01))
  (test both (near? (final 200 25 8) 162.0 0.01)))

objective: Compute tip, total, and per-person ceil-rounded share.
solution:
(module TipSplit
  (defun ceil_cents (x)
    (/ (math_ceil (* x 100)) 100))
  (defun per_share (subtotal tip_pct people)
    (def tip (* subtotal (/ tip_pct 100)))
    (def total (+ subtotal tip))
    (ceil_cents (/ total people)))
  (test simple (near? (per_share 100 20 4) 30.0 0.01))
  (test odd (near? (per_share 53.33 15 3) 20.44 0.01))
  (test no_tip (near? (per_share 100 0 5) 20.0 0.01)))

objective: Compute principal*(1+rate/n)^(n*years), rounded to cents.
solution:
(module Compound
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun grow (principal rate n years)
    (def r (/ (/ rate 100) n))
    (def total (* n years))
    (round2 (* principal (math_pow (+ 1 r) total))))
  (test no_growth (near? (grow 1000 0 12 5) 1000.0 0.01))
  (test annual (near? (grow 1000 5 1 1) 1050.0 0.01))
  (test five_year (near? (grow 1000 5 1 5) 1276.28 0.05)))

(module Shipping
  (defun zone_fee (z)
    (if (= z 0) (return 0))
    (if (= z 1) (return 2))
    (if (= z 2) (return 5))
    10)
  (defun ship_cost (weight zone express)
    (def base 5.0)
    (def w (* weight 0.5))
    (def z (zone_fee zone))
    (def e (if (= express 1) 15 0))
    (+ base w z e))
  (test plain (near? (ship_cost 0 0 0) 5.0 0.01))
  (test zone3 (near? (ship_cost 0 3 0) 15.0 0.01))
  (test heavy (near? (ship_cost 4 0 0) 7.0 0.01))
  (test express (near? (ship_cost 0 0 1) 20.0 0.01))
  (test all (near? (ship_cost 10 3 1) 35.0 0.01)))

objective: Compute BMI = kg/(m^2) and classify into Underweight/Normal/Overweight/Obese.
solution:
(module Bmi
  (defun bmi (kg cm)
    (def m (/ cm 100))
    (/ kg (* m m)))
  (defun classify (b)
    (if (< b 18.5) (return "Underweight"))
    (if (< b 25) (return "Normal"))
    (if (< b 30) (return "Overweight"))
    "Obese")
  (defun bmi_class (kg cm)
    (classify (bmi kg cm)))
  (test thin (eq? (bmi_class 50 175) "Underweight"))
  (test normal (eq? (bmi_class 70 175) "Normal"))
  (test over (eq? (bmi_class 85 175) "Overweight"))
  (test obese (eq? (bmi_class 110 175) "Obese")))

objective: Standard amortization: P*r*(1+r)^n / ((1+r)^n - 1), rounded to cents. r is monthly rate, n is months.
solution:
(module Loan
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun monthly_payment (principal annual_pct years)
    (def r (/ (/ annual_pct 100) 12))
    (def n (* years 12))
    (if (= r 0) (return (round2 (/ principal n))))
    (def g (math_pow (+ 1 r) n))
    (round2 (/ (* principal (* r g)) (- g 1))))
  (test zero_rate (near? (monthly_payment 12000 0 1) 1000.0 0.05))
  (test simple (near? (monthly_payment 100000 6 30) 599.55 0.05)))

objective: Three-bracket progressive tax: 10% to 10k, 20% to 50k, 30% above.
solution:
(module ProgTax
  (defun min2 (a b)
    (if (< a b) (return a))
    b)
  (defun max2 (a b)
    (if (> a b) (return a))
    b)
  (defun income_tax (income)
    (def t1 (* (min2 income 10000) 0.10))
    (def t2 (* (max2 0 (- (min2 income 50000) 10000)) 0.20))
    (def t3 (* (max2 0 (- income 50000)) 0.30))
    (+ t1 t2 t3))
  (test zero (near? (income_tax 0) 0.0 0.01))
  (test low (near? (income_tax 5000) 500.0 0.01))
  (test mid (near? (income_tax 30000) 5000.0 0.01))
  (test boundary (near? (income_tax 50000) 9000.0 0.01))
  (test high (near? (income_tax 100000) 24000.0 0.01)))

objective: Weighted average of three values with three weights (weights sum > 0).
solution:
(module WAvg
  (defun weighted_avg (a wa b wb c wc)
    (def num (+ (* a wa) (* b wb) (* c wc)))
    (def den (+ wa wb wc))
    (/ num den))
  (test equal (near? (weighted_avg 1 1 2 1 3 1) 2.0 0.001))
  (test biased (near? (weighted_avg 10 1 0 0 0 0) 10.0 0.001))
  (test mid (near? (weighted_avg 80 2 90 1 70 1) 80.0 0.001)))

objective: Split on space, reverse order, join.
solution:
(module ReverseWords
  (defun reverse_words (s)
    (def parts (str_split s " "))
    (def n (arr_length parts))
    (def out "")
    (def i (- n 1))
    (while (>= i 0)
      (set out (str_concat out (arr_get parts i)))
      (if (> i 0) (set out (str_concat out " ")))
      (set i (- i 1)))
    out)
  (test simple (eq? (reverse_words "hello world") "world hello"))
  (test single (eq? (reverse_words "foo") "foo"))
  (test three (eq? (reverse_words "a b c") "c b a")))

objective: Return number of space-delimited words.
solution:
(module WordCount

  (test one (eq? (word_count "hello") 1))
  (test two (eq? (word_count "hi there") 2))

objective: Return 1 if c is a vowel (case-insensitive), 0 otherwise.
solution:

objective: Count vowels in string, case-insensitive.
solution:
(module CountVowels
  (defun is_vowel (c)
    (def lc (str_lower c))
    (if (str_eq lc "a") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq lc "e") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq lc "i") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq lc "o") (return 1))
    (if (str_eq lc "u") (return 1))
    0)
  (defun count_vowels (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def total 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (set total (+ total (is_vowel (str_substring s i 1))))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    total)
  (test empty (eq? (count_vowels "") 0))
  (test none (eq? (count_vowels "xyz") 0))
  (test all (eq? (count_vowels "AEIOU") 5))
  (test mixed (eq? (count_vowels "Hello World") 3)))

objective: Reverse a string char by char.
solution:
(module ReverseString
  (defun reverse_str (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i (- n 1))
    (def out "")
    (while (>= i 0)
      (set out (str_concat out (str_substring s i 1)))
      (set i (- i 1)))
    out)
  (test empty (eq? (reverse_str "") ""))
  (test single (eq? (reverse_str "a") "a"))
  (test simple (eq? (reverse_str "hello") "olleh"))
  (test even (eq? (reverse_str "abcd") "dcba")))

objective: Return 1 if parens balanced and never negative depth, 0 otherwise.
solution:
(module BalancedParens
  (defun balanced (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def d 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (def c (str_substring s i 1))
      (if (str_eq c "(") (set d (+ d 1)))
      (if (str_eq c ")") (set d (- d 1)))
      (if (< d 0) (return 0))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    (if (= d 0) 1 0))
  (test empty (eq? (balanced "") 1))
  (test simple (eq? (balanced "()") 1))
  (test nested (eq? (balanced "((()))") 1))
  (test mismatch (eq? (balanced "(()") 0))
  (test reverse (eq? (balanced ")(") 0)))

objective: Return max of first `size` elements.
solution:
(module ArrMax
  (defun arr_max (xs size)
    (def best (arr_get xs 0))
    (def i 1)
    (while (< i size)
      (def v (arr_get xs i))
      (if (> v best) (set best v))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    best)
  (test single
    (def a (arr_new 1))
    (arr_set a 0 42)
    (eq? (arr_max a 1) 42))
  (test eight
    (def a (arr_new 8))
    (arr_set a 0 3) (arr_set a 1 1) (arr_set a 2 4) (arr_set a 3 1)
    (arr_set a 4 5) (arr_set a 5 9) (arr_set a 6 2) (arr_set a 7 6)
    (eq? (arr_max a 8) 9))
  (test negs
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 -7) (arr_set a 1 -2) (arr_set a 2 -5)
    (eq? (arr_max a 3) -2)))

objective: Sum first n elements of an array.
solution:
(module ArrSum
  (defun arr_sum (xs n)
    (def i 0)
    (def s 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (set s (+ s (arr_get xs i)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    s)
  (test empty
    (def a (arr_new 0))
    (eq? (arr_sum a 0) 0))
  (test small
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 3)
    (eq? (arr_sum a 3) 6))
  (test prefix
    (def a (arr_new 5))
    (arr_set a 0 10) (arr_set a 1 20) (arr_set a 2 30) (arr_set a 3 100) (arr_set a 4 100)
    (eq? (arr_sum a 3) 60)))

objective: Return index of first element equal to target, or -1.
solution:
(module LinearSearch
  (defun find_idx (xs n target)
    (def i 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (= (arr_get xs i) target) (return i))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    -1)
  (test found
    (def a (arr_new 4))
    (arr_set a 0 10) (arr_set a 1 20) (arr_set a 2 30) (arr_set a 3 40)
    (eq? (find_idx a 4 30) 2))
  (test missing
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 3)
    (eq? (find_idx a 3 99) -1))
  (test first
    (def a (arr_new 2))
    (arr_set a 0 5) (arr_set a 1 10)
    (eq? (find_idx a 2 5) 0)))

objective: Return min of four numbers.

objective: Read env var, return 1 if equals 'yes' (case-insensitive), 0 otherwise.

objective: Read env as int, ensure it's >= min (else return min).
solution:
(module EnvMin
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")

  (test below (mocks (env.get "X" "5")) (eq? (env_at_least "X" 10) 10))

objective: Read file, return content up to first newline, else full content.
solution:
(module FirstLine

    (def idx (str_index_of s "\n"))

    (str_substring s 0 idx))

objective: Count occurrences of a character in a file.
solution:
(module CountInFile
  (extern defun file_read (p) @capability "file.read")
  (defun count_char_file (p c)
    (def s (file_read p))
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def total 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) c) (set total (+ total 1)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    total)
  (test empty (mocks (file.read "/f" "")) (eq? (count_char_file "/f" "x") 0))
  (test none (mocks (file.read "/f" "abc")) (eq? (count_char_file "/f" "x") 0))
  (test multi (mocks (file.read "/f" "banana")) (eq? (count_char_file "/f" "a") 3)))

objective: Hours up to 40 paid at rate; over 40 at 1.5x rate. Subtract FICA 7.65%.
solution:
(module Paycheck
  (defun gross (hours rate)
    (if (<= hours 40) (return (* hours rate)))
    (+ (* 40 rate) (* (- hours 40) (* rate 1.5))))
  (defun fica (g)
    (* g 0.0765))
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun net_pay (hours rate)
    (def g (gross hours rate))
    (round2 (- g (fica g))))
  (test no_ot (near? (net_pay 40 20) 738.8 0.05))
  (test ot (near? (net_pay 50 20) 1015.85 0.05))
  (test zero (near? (net_pay 0 20) 0.0 0.01)))

objective: Days * daily_rate + tax_pct, with weekly discount if days>=7.
solution:
(module Rental
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun base_rental (days daily)
    (* days daily))
  (defun apply_weekly (amt days)
    (if (>= days 7) (return (* amt 0.9)))
    amt)
  (defun add_tax (amt pct)
    (* amt (+ 1 (/ pct 100))))
  (defun rental_total (days daily tax)
    (def b (base_rental days daily))
    (def d (apply_weekly b days))
    (round2 (add_tax d tax)))
  (test short (near? (rental_total 3 50 0) 150.0 0.01))
  (test week (near? (rental_total 7 50 0) 315.0 0.01))
  (test with_tax (near? (rental_total 3 100 10) 330.0 0.01))
  (test long_with_tax (near? (rental_total 7 100 10) 693.0 0.01)))

objective: Average four grades after dropping the lowest, return letter grade.
solution:
(module GradeAvg
  (defun min4 (a b c d)
    (def m a)
    (if (< b m) (set m b))
    (if (< c m) (set m c))
    (if (< d m) (set m d))
    m)
  (defun avg_drop_lowest (a b c d)
    (def lo (min4 a b c d))
    (/ (- (+ a b c d) lo) 3))
  (defun letter (avg)
    (if (>= avg 90) (return "A"))
    (if (>= avg 80) (return "B"))
    (if (>= avg 70) (return "C"))
    (if (>= avg 60) (return "D"))
    "F")
  (defun grade (a b c d)
    (letter (avg_drop_lowest a b c d)))
  (test perfect (eq? (grade 100 100 100 100) "A"))
  (test mixed (eq? (grade 95 88 72 60) "B"))
  (test low_drop (eq? (grade 80 80 80 0) "B"))
  (test fail (eq? (grade 60 55 50 45) "F")))

  (defun add_tax (amt pct)
    (* amt (+ 1 (/ pct 100))))
  (defun cart_total (p1 q1 p2 q2 tax)

(module Electric

objective: Greatest common divisor via Euclid's algorithm.
solution:
(module Gcd
  (defun gcd (a b)
    (def x a)
    (def y b)
    (while (> y 0)
      (def t y)
      (set y (math_mod x y))
      (set x t))
    x)
  (test simple (eq? (gcd 12 8) 4))
  (test prime (eq? (gcd 7 13) 1))
  (test same (eq? (gcd 9 9) 9))
  (test one_zero (eq? (gcd 5 0) 5)))

objective: Least common multiple via gcd.
solution:
(module Lcm
  (defun gcd (a b)
    (def x a)
    (def y b)
    (while (> y 0)
      (def t y)
      (set y (math_mod x y))
      (set x t))
    x)
  (defun lcm (a b)
    (/ (* a b) (gcd a b)))
  (test simple (eq? (lcm 4 6) 12))
  (test prime (eq? (lcm 3 5) 15))
  (test same (eq? (lcm 7 7) 7)))

objective: Trial-division primality up to sqrt(n).
solution:
(module IsPrime
  (defun is_prime (n)
    (if (< n 2) (return 0))
    (if (= n 2) (return 1))
    (if (= (math_mod n 2) 0) (return 0))
    (def i 3)
    (def b (math_floor (math_sqrt n)))
    (while (<= i b)
      (if (= (math_mod n i) 0) (return 0))
      (set i (+ i 2)))
    1)
  (test two (eq? (is_prime 2) 1))
  (test three (eq? (is_prime 3) 1))
  (test four (eq? (is_prime 4) 0))
  (test seventeen (eq? (is_prime 17) 1))
  (test ninety_one (eq? (is_prime 91) 0)))

objective: Iterative Fibonacci.
solution:
(module Fib
  (defun fib (n)
    (if (< n 2) (return n))
    (def a 0)
    (def b 1)
    (def i 2)
    (while (<= i n)
      (def t (+ a b))
      (set a b)
      (set b t)
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    b)
  (test zero (eq? (fib 0) 0))
  (test one (eq? (fib 1) 1))
  (test two (eq? (fib 2) 1))
  (test ten (eq? (fib 10) 55))
  (test fifteen (eq? (fib 15) 610)))

objective: Number of steps for Collatz sequence to reach 1.
solution:
(module Collatz
  (defun collatz_steps (n)
    (def steps 0)
    (def x n)
    (while (> x 1)
      (if (= (math_mod x 2) 0) (set x (/ x 2)) (set x (+ (* x 3) 1)))
      (set steps (+ steps 1)))
    steps)
  (test one (eq? (collatz_steps 1) 0))
  (test two (eq? (collatz_steps 2) 1))
  (test six (eq? (collatz_steps 6) 8))
  (test twenty_seven (eq? (collatz_steps 27) 111)))

objective: Repeated digit sum until single digit.
solution:
(module DigitalRoot
  (defun digit_sum (n)
    (def s 0)
    (def cur n)
    (while (> cur 0)
      (set s (+ s (math_mod cur 10)))
      (set cur (math_floor (/ cur 10))))
    s)
  (defun digital_root (n)
    (def x n)
    (while (>= x 10)
      (set x (digit_sum x)))
    x)
  (test single (eq? (digital_root 7) 7))
  (test small (eq? (digital_root 38) 2))
  (test big (eq? (digital_root 9999) 9)))

    (def x n)
    (def f 2)
    (def best 1)
    (while (<= (* f f) x)

        (set best f)
        (set x (/ x f)))
      (set f (+ f 1)))
    (if (> x 1) (set best x))
    best)

objective: Read three env vars, return concatenation, '-' separator. If any missing return 'incomplete'.
solution:
(module Combine3
  (extern defun env_read (k) @capability "env.get")
  (defun combine ()
    (def a (env_read "A"))
    (def b (env_read "B"))
    (def c (env_read "C"))
    (if (str_eq a "") (return "incomplete"))
    (if (str_eq b "") (return "incomplete"))
    (if (str_eq c "") (return "incomplete"))
    (str_concat a (str_concat "-" (str_concat b (str_concat "-" c)))))
  (test all (mocks (env.get "A" "x") (env.get "B" "y") (env.get "C" "z")) (eq? (combine) "x-y-z"))
  (test missing (mocks (env.get "A" "x") (env.get "B" "") (env.get "C" "z")) (eq? (combine) "incomplete")))

objective: Fetch URL, count newlines.
solution:
(module HttpLines
  (extern defun http_get (u) @capability "http.fetch")
  (defun count_lines (u)
    (def s (http_get u))
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i 0)
    (def c 0)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) "\n") (set c (+ c 1)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    c)
  (test empty (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "")) (eq? (count_lines "http://x") 0))
  (test single (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "a\n")) (eq? (count_lines "http://x") 1))
  (test multi (mocks (http.fetch "http://x" "a\nb\nc")) (eq? (count_lines "http://x") 2)))

objective: Compute BMI, classify with single letter U/N/O/X.
solution:
(module BmiLetter
  (defun bmi (kg cm)
    (def m (/ cm 100))
    (/ kg (* m m)))
  (defun letter (b)
    (if (< b 18.5) (return "U"))
    (if (< b 25) (return "N"))
    (if (< b 30) (return "O"))
    "X")
  (defun classify (kg cm)
    (letter (bmi kg cm)))
  (test thin (eq? (classify 50 175) "U"))
  (test normal (eq? (classify 70 175) "N"))
  (test over (eq? (classify 85 175) "O"))
  (test obese (eq? (classify 110 175) "X")))

objective: $30 base, +$0.10/min for first 100 over, +$0.05/min thereafter.

(module PhoneTiered

  (defun max2 (a b) (if (> a b) (return a)) b)

objective: Compute monthly payment for given P, annual rate, years.
solution:
(module Amort
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun monthly (p annual_pct years)
    (def r (/ (/ annual_pct 100) 12))
    (def n (* years 12))
    (if (= r 0) (return (round2 (/ p n))))
    (def g (math_pow (+ 1 r) n))
    (round2 (/ (* p (* r g)) (- g 1))))
  (test no_int (near? (monthly 12000 0 1) 1000.0 0.05))
  (test classic (near? (monthly 100000 6 30) 599.55 0.05)))

objective: Standard monthly amortization formula.
solution:
(module LoanClassic
  (defun round2 (x) (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun amortize (principal annual_pct years)
    (def r (/ (/ annual_pct 100) 12))
    (def n (* years 12))
    (if (= r 0) (return (round2 (/ principal n))))
    (def growth (math_pow (+ 1 r) n))
    (round2 (/ (* (* principal r) growth) (- growth 1))))
  (test mortgage_30y (near? (amortize 200000 4.5 30) 1013.37 0.05))
  (test car_5y (near? (amortize 25000 6 5) 483.32 0.05))
  (test no_interest (near? (amortize 1200 0 1) 100.0 0.05)))

(module CompoundQ

  (defun grow (p r n t) (* p (math_pow (+ 1 r) (* n t))))
  (defun amount (p annual n t)

    (round2 (grow p r n t)))

objective: Return 1 if n is positive power of 2, else 0.

(module Pow2
  (defun is_pow2 (n)
    (if (<= n 0) (return 0))
    (def x n)
    (while (= (math_mod x 2) 0)
      (set x (/ x 2)))
    (if (= x 1) 1 0))

objective: Reverse string by iterating from end.
solution:
(module Reverse
  (defun rev (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (def i (- n 1))
    (def out "")
    (while (>= i 0)
      (set out (str_concat out (str_substring s i 1)))
      (set i (- i 1)))
    out)
  (test empty (eq? (rev "") ""))
  (test single (eq? (rev "a") "a"))

objective: Longest run of same character in string.
solution:
(module LongRun
  (defun longest_run (s)
    (def n (str_length s))
    (if (= n 0) (return 0))
    (def best 1)
    (def cur 1)
    (def i 1)
    (while (< i n)
      (if (str_eq (str_substring s i 1) (str_substring s (- i 1) 1))
        (set cur (+ cur 1))
        (set cur 1))
      (if (> cur best) (set best cur))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    best)
  (test empty (eq? (longest_run "") 0))
  (test single (eq? (longest_run "a") 1))
  (test simple (eq? (longest_run "aabbb") 3))
  (test alt (eq? (longest_run "abab") 1)))

objective: Return last fibonacci value <= limit.
solution:
(module FibUntil
  (defun fib_until (limit)
    (def a 0)
    (def b 1)
    (while (<= b limit)
      (def t (+ a b))
      (set a b)
      (set b t))
    a)
  (test one (eq? (fib_until 1) 1))
  (test fifteen (eq? (fib_until 15) 13))
  (test hundred (eq? (fib_until 100) 89)))

      (set i (+ i 1)))

    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 3) (arr_set a 2 5)

    (def a (arr_new 5))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 3) (arr_set a 3 4) (arr_set a 4 5)
    (eq? (count_evens a 5) 2)))

objective: Standard loan formula with helpers: monthly_rate, total_periods, growth, payment, round2.
solution:
(module LoanFull
  (defun monthly_rate (annual_pct)
    (/ (/ annual_pct 100) 12))
  (defun total_periods (years)
    (* years 12))
  (defun growth (r n)
    (math_pow (+ 1 r) n))
  (defun amortize (p r n)
    (def g (growth r n))
    (/ (* p (* r g)) (- g 1)))
  (defun round2 (x)
    (/ (math_floor (+ (* x 100) 0.5)) 100))
  (defun monthly_payment (principal annual_pct years)
    (def r (monthly_rate annual_pct))
    (def n (total_periods years))
    (if (= r 0) (return (round2 (/ principal n))))
    (round2 (amortize principal r n)))

objective: Drop lowest of 4, average remaining 3, letter.
solution:
(module Grade4
  (defun min4 (a b c d)
    (def m a)
    (if (< b m) (set m b))
    (if (< c m) (set m c))
    (if (< d m) (set m d))
    m)
  (defun sum4 (a b c d)
    (+ a (+ b (+ c d))))
  (defun avg_drop_lowest (a b c d)
    (/ (- (sum4 a b c d) (min4 a b c d)) 3))
  (defun letter (avg)
    (if (>= avg 90) (return "A"))
    (if (>= avg 80) (return "B"))
    (if (>= avg 70) (return "C"))
    (if (>= avg 60) (return "D"))
    "F")
  (defun grade (a b c d)
    (letter (avg_drop_lowest a b c d)))
  (test perfect (eq? (grade 100 100 100 100) "A"))
  (test mixed_b (eq? (grade 95 88 72 60) "B"))
  (test all_zero_dropped (eq? (grade 100 90 80 0) "A"))
  (test fail (eq? (grade 60 55 50 45) "F")))

objective: Binary search on sorted array, return index or -1.
solution:
(module BinSearch
  (defun bsearch (xs n target)
    (def lo 0)
    (def hi (- n 1))
    (while (<= lo hi)
      (def mid (math_floor (/ (+ lo hi) 2)))
      (def m (arr_get xs mid))
      (if (= m target) (return mid))
      (if (< m target) (set lo (+ mid 1)) (set hi (- mid 1))))
    -1)
  (test found
    (def a (arr_new 5))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 3) (arr_set a 2 5) (arr_set a 3 7) (arr_set a 4 9)
    (eq? (bsearch a 5 5) 2))
  (test not_found
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 3)
    (eq? (bsearch a 3 99) -1))
  (test first
    (def a (arr_new 3))
    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 2) (arr_set a 2 3)
    (eq? (bsearch a 3 1) 0)))

      (if (> v first)
        (do (set second first) (set first v))
        (if (> v second) (set second v)))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    second)

      (arr_set xs j tmp)
      (set i (+ i 1))
      (set j (- j 1))))

objective: Build running max array.

(module RunMax
  (defun running_max (xs n)
    (def out (arr_new n))
    (if (= n 0) (return out))
    (arr_set out 0 (arr_get xs 0))
    (def i 1)
    (while (< i n)
      (def cur (arr_get xs i))
      (def prev (arr_get out (- i 1)))
      (if (> cur prev)
        (arr_set out i cur)
        (arr_set out i prev))
      (set i (+ i 1)))
    out)
  (test simple

    (arr_set a 0 1) (arr_set a 1 3) (arr_set a 2 2) (arr_set a 3 5)
    (def r (running_max a 4))
    (eq? (arr_get r 3) 5)))
